description: Curated registry of well-known prediction market categories on Pharos. The Agent uses this as a fast-path lookup; on-chain discovery is the source of truth.

categories.label: Crypto Price
categories.description: Markets on the future price of major crypto assets (BTC, ETH, etc.).

categories.label: Pharos Ecosystem
categories.description: Markets about Pharos network metrics (TVL, daily active users, validator count).

categories.label: Macro / Regulation
categories.description: Markets on macro events: rate decisions, regulatory rulings, etc.

categories.label: Tech & AI
categories.description: Markets on technology milestones and AI capabilities.

categories.label: Sports
categories.description: Markets on sporting events and tournaments.

categories.label: Culture & Entertainment
categories.description: Markets on awards, releases, pop culture events.

low.label: Tight spread, deep book — safe to market-buy

high.label: Thin book — expect material slippage, small size only
